content: LLM compression format landscape (2026): GGUF is the only format running on CPU/Apple/edge with single-file container (weights+tokenizer+metadata), K-quants Q2-Q8 + IQ-quants, partial GPU offload via -ngl. GPTQ/AWQ/EXL2 are quantization METHODS stored in safetensors, GPU-only. AWQ=4-bit activation-aware (protects 1% salient channels), GPTQ=4-bit layer-wise reconstruction with Hessian, EXL2=fractional bits per layer (mixed precision). Quality differences at same bit width are small; tool/engine compatibility and inference speed drive choice, not quality. GGUF Q4_K_M is the universal local default.
